text: Terrible experience. Placed a Sensex Call order, but the app glitched and didn't even show the order in my dashboard. I tried to cancel immediately, but the app was unresponsive. It finally 'ghost executed' my order at a much higher price (₹291) when the market had already crashed to ₹256. I have a full screen recording of the app failing to cancel and hiding my active positions. If you value your capital, stay away. I am filing a formal complaint with SEBI SCORES.
cleanText: Terrible experience. Placed a Sensex Call order, but the app glitched and didn't even show the order in my dashboard. I tried to cancel immediately, but the app was unresponsive. It finally 'ghost executed' my order at a much higher price (₹291) when the market had already crashed to ₹256. I have a full screen recording of the app failing to cancel and hiding my active positions. If you value your capital, stay away. I am filing a formal complaint with SEBI SCORES.

text: Yesterday, I installed the Groww app and began intraday trading. After buying stocks, I tried to exit my positions but faced an issue with the app. I called customer support and waited about 10 minutes. After a 43 Minute call, she was told that I needed to use a laptop to exit. I realised I would have been in a tough spot if I hadn’t had a laptop available. I also worry about what might have happened if I had invested a larger amount and faced a bigger loss while using the app.

After buying stocks, I tried to exit my positions but faced an issue with the app. I called customer support and waited about 10 minutes. After a 43 Minute call, she was told that I needed to use a laptop to exit. I realised I would have been in a tough spot if I hadn’t had a laptop available. I also worry about what might have happened if I had invested a larger amount and faced a bigger loss while using the app.
